name: pixel-forge
description: Visual app editor with screenshot bootstrap and live editing for real running apps.

scripts.check:desktop: node --check apps/desktop/main.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/shell-preload.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/preview-preload.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/picker-overlay-preload.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/selection-engine.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/updater-preload.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/version.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/controller-update-runner.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm check:version && pnpm check:shell && pnpm check:api && pnpm check:desktop && pnpm lint:web && pnpm test:web && pnpm check:web && pnpm smoke:install && pnpm smoke:update
